untranslatable_reason: Signal requires confirmation of specific technical indicators (divergence, advance/decline, sentiment, put/call ratio) that are not in the allowed indicator list. Advance/decline ratio, sentiment indicators, and put/call ratio cannot be constructed from available price/volume data. Substituted with ADX + MACD as proxy for multi-signal confirmation, but this does not faithfully represent the original rule's requirement for independent signal diversity.
translation_notes: The rule emphasizes waiting for technical signal confirmation rather than predicting direction. Used ADX (trend confirmation) + MACD (directional momentum) as two independent aligned signals. The 3-bar time window is implicit in standard indicator calculations. Original rule mentions divergence, advance/decline, sentiment, and put/call ratio—none of which can be derived from the allowed indicator set. This is a best-effort approximation only.
